name: YURI

and within waits the lewd, cold Yuri, eternally starved for blood and carnal desire.

name: SAEM

name: JINSEONG

name: JUNCHEOL

name: HYERI

[MIDEUM]

¡°Mideum! What¡¯s up?¡±

name: MINSEOP

¡°Jian¡¦ you fucking bitch¡¦ I will definitely kill you.¡±

name: NARI
